decision.summary: Approved for full launch after C-14 repository final inspection shows no P0 blocker and H-stage release signoffs are documented.
p1_items_allowed_as_release_tracking: PL-01 production deploy tracking for ops_ai image refresh

checks.title: C-14 architecture consistency final inspection
checks.evidence: docs/C14_INSPECTION_REPORT.md reports repository automatic gates with no blocker.

checks.title: PR required gates defined
checks.evidence: C-14 verifies admin-ci, backend-ci, and ops-guard gates.

checks.title: Nightly/E2E stability evidence
checks.evidence: C-14 references C-12 stability_met true with 3/3 runs.

checks.title: AI end-to-end smoke
checks.evidence: docs/C08_INSPECTION_REPORT.md records 8/8 fixture pass and <8s budget.

checks.title: Level engine smoke and routing
checks.evidence: docs/reports/J01_LEVEL_SMOKE_REPORT.md records 10/10 pass for S/A/B/C/D routes.

checks.title: Grafana and alerting baseline
checks.evidence: C-13 deliverables include Grafana integration and monitoring/alerts/eris-alerts.yml.

checks.title: Operator dashboard and handoff readiness
checks.evidence: C-10/C-11 reports cover dashboard handoff, priority, modal, and disconnect UX.

checks.title: Human release signoffs
checks.evidence: H-01 through H-09 baseline signoffs are documented or approved in task PRs.

checks.title: Gray release approvals
checks.evidence: H-07 approves Week9 C/D only; H-08 approves Week10-11 B observation and A/S handoff.

checks.title: Rollback and pause plan
checks.evidence: docs/BETA_CHECKLIST.md and H-07/H-08 signoffs define pause conditions, rollback, and evidence capture.

checks.title: Final production launch operating checklist
checks.evidence: docs/C14_PRELAUNCH_FINAL_REVIEW.md defines production health, admin, nightly, static sync, and issue tracking checks.

post_launch_tracking: Record production image refresh and deployment timestamp for PL-01.
Attach Grafana production visual signoff evidence for PL-03.
Confirm business-flow static copy is synced to nginx/static hosting for PL-04.
Run beta/full-launch metrics cadence at +1h, +4h, +24h, and daily for seven days.
acceptance: Rollback and pause plan is documented.
